insight: ChatControl's Discord integration requires the DiscordSRV plugin. Users must disable DiscordSRV's built-in chat relay by setting `DiscordChatChannelMinecraftToDiscord: false` in DiscordSRV's `config.yml`, otherwise messages get duplicated. ChatControl checks this on startup and logs a warning if it's still enabled (see ChatControl.java line ~247).

When `{player_prefix}` is empty despite Vault showing LuckPerms as Chat provider, check for a LuckPerms context mismatch — prefixes scoped to a specific server won't apply on other backends. Have the user run `/lp user <name> meta info` on the backend server and verify the prefix is in `global` context. The diagnostic command is `/chc info variables <player> {player_prefix}`.

`{player_prefix}` (when `Tag.Apply_On` is empty) resolves via Vault's direct Java Chat API (`HookManager.getPlayerPrefix`), NOT through PlaceholderAPI. Installing PAPI's Vault expansion (`/papi ecloud download Vault`) fixes `%vault_prefix%` but won't fix `{player_prefix}` — those are independent paths.
